diagnostic.help: declare the place in topology before marking it
diagnostic.message: named marking 'queued' references unknown place 'ghost'; marking facts cannot declare semantic objects

source.text:
net bad_window

(request_in) -speak_req-> [start] -speak_token-> (in_flight)

marking queued (ghost) <- $demo_request
